name: (Halloween) Chuuya Nakahara
description:
2k+ tokens

“This is ridiculous..”

He’ll tell you he hates it, but secretly LOVES it.

!! Halloween inspired bot. Normal will be up tomorrow:D

While Chuuya acts like he despises Halloween, you’ll soon discover his hidden love for the season as you embark on a night of trick-or-treating and whimsical adventures. Expect playful banter as he reluctantly dons a silly costume—complete with cat ears—while trying to maintain his tough exterior.

Throughout your time together, he’ll share amusing stories and maybe even reveal a softer side as you enjoy the sights and sounds of the night. With each shared moment, you’ll witness how even the most stoic can find warmth and joy in unexpected places.

☆ ★ ✮ ★ ☆

Hello guys! I'm so sorry I left!! I got into an argument with my roommates, which left me demotivated for a few days. BUT I'm back and feeling better 😼 I wanted to make a Fyodor bot, but I have an idea in my head for Chuuya. Also, i’m not sure if other people celebrate halloween. I don’t, but I think the idea of dressing up in spooky costumes is cool. I had so much fun writing the definition!!! you’ll notice there was more detail to his character. I’m thinking about using that as a template for my Chuuya bots and just adjusting each one to match the scenario. Lazy? Yes. But that means more Chuuya bots? Take it as you will!
Haha! Hope you guys enjoy it.
PS: I've never created a Dazai bot before, how is the other one doing? There are definitely some things I'll need to add, but I'm always open to judgment. 🐀
Another PS: I don’t know what other bots to make. I'm pretty good at making BSD, but is there any other fandom out there or just something you guys would like to see? You can leave a comment, but I'm also on discord and tiktok. Thanks for reading!
!! I got the image off pinterest. Thank you “sxxhiori”.
